claim_under_attack: A 2-week Discovery Research Brief is the correct next artifact because it is the cheapest way to determine whether the feature idea has any evidentiary basis, requiring only PM/researcher time and no engineering resources.
evidence_or_reason: This claim asserts cost, duration, and resource needs without any supporting evidence from the case packet or artifact. The artifact itself admits the feature is unspecified and that no first-party data or technical assessment has been performed, so it cannot credibly conclude that a 2-week brief is the cheapest valid path or that no engineering input is needed. For some feature classes, a quick engineering spike or data pull could be cheaper and more informative than interviews plus competitive research.
